name: DSG Governance Gate
description: Automated policy gates to evaluate payments and manage transaction reviews.
about: DSG Governance Gate evaluates Stripe payments and charges against configurable policy rules, returning an ALLOW, BLOCK, or REVIEW decision visible inside the Stripe Dashboard payment detail view. Each decision is logged with a proof hash and policy version to support compliance review.

features.name: Automated policy evaluation
features.description: Evaluate payments and charges against your governance ruleset. Each transaction receives an ALLOW, BLOCK, or REVIEW decision based on configurable policy rules, visible in the Stripe Dashboard payment detail panel.

features.name: Decision audit log
features.description: Each governance decision is logged with a proof hash, timestamp, and policy version — giving compliance teams a verifiable record of evaluated transactions directly from the dashboard.

features.name: High-risk transaction flagging
features.description: Transactions exceeding defined risk thresholds are flagged for manual review. Operators can view the flagged decision and policy details inside the app panel in the Stripe Dashboard payment detail view.

permissions.purpose: Read charge details to display governance policy decisions in the payment detail view
Apply governance decisions to charge operations when a policy rule triggers a block or review
Monitor payment intents for policy compliance checks before capture
Track payouts to maintain a complete governance audit trail across all fund movements

content_security_policy.purpose: Connect to DSG governance API for policy evaluation and audit recording
